description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was traveling southeast on 2nd Street, preparing to change lanes to the right to 
turn onto Broadway in Santa Monica, when it was hit on the right rear corner (rear bumper, hatch, right rear wheel, and right 
rear quarter panel) by an SUV (Vehicle 2). The Zoox vehicle stopped facing southwest on Broadway, with the front of Vehicle 2 
still engaged with the right rear of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle sustained severe rear damage, including damage to data 
recording systems. Vehicle 2 had major damage to its front end. Airbags deployed in both vehicles, and they were towed from 
the scene. Police and emergency responders arrived to assist, and the driver of vehicle 2 was detained. The Zoox vehicle 
operator and two passengers reported soreness and a headache after the collision.
Print
Clear Form
